exploration_notes:
The old ConsumerConnector interface (kafka.consumer.ConsumerConnector) from the pre-0.9 Scala-based consumer API is no longer present in this codebase—it was fully removed in later Kafka versions. The modern Kafka codebase has evolved the consumer architecture into a two-implementation delegation pattern:

1. **Consumer interface** (`Consumer.java`) defines the public API contract with `commitSync`/`commitAsync` methods.
